title: Non-tail recursion safe depth regressed: rec_deep_nontco margin row SIGILLs at 250k (was 270k-first-fail)
goal: Sweep E re-verification (2026-07-03, master 0733dc9b). tests/stress/rec_deep_nontco_250k.esk is a NORMAL (non-xknown) budget row calibrated 2026-07-02 as a safe margin: docs recorded first SIGILL at 270000 (JIT) / 280000 (AOT), so 250000 was chosen with headroom. On current master it SIGILLs (rc 132, no diagnostic) at 250000 under BOTH -r and AOT. Empirical bisection on current build: JIT 240000 PASS, 250000 SIGILL; AOT 200000 PASS, 250000 SIGILL. The safe non-tail depth has shrunk ~20k frames since the calibration - per-frame stack cost grew or the execution-thread stack shrank. Same underlying no-diagnostic stack-blowout as ESH-0101; this entry tracks the boundary REGRESSION and the budget re-calibration.
acceptance: non-tail (down 260000) returns OK 260000 under -r and AOT (restore documented headroom), OR a graceful recursion-depth diagnostic replaces the SIGILL
tests/stress/rec_deep_nontco_250k.esk budget row passes without re-calibration
campaign_payoff: Deep non-tail recursion that used to complete now crashes; silent headroom regression on plain user recursion.

verifications.evidence: JIT: 240k OK / 250k rc132. AOT: 200k OK / 250k rc132. Budget margin row re-calibrated 250000 -> 200000 to keep the CI gate honest; see also ESH-0101.
